message:
fix: daemon fail-safe when Dolt unavailable, suppress docked-rig warnings

When isRigOperational() cannot check rig bead status (Dolt down), it now
fails safe by returning not-operational instead of defaulting to operational.
This prevents witnesses from starting for docked rigs during Dolt outages.

Also adds rigs.json fallback when config.json is missing, and suppresses
agent bead warnings in GUPP/orphan checks when all rigs are docked.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2600
Author: ChicK00o (Rohit Bhosle)

Co-authored-by: Rohit Bhosle <mail@rohitbhosle.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
